steps.title: Identify the sides relative to angle y°
steps.content: This is a right triangle with the right angle at the bottom right. The side opposite angle $y°$ is the vertical side = 5. The hypotenuse is the diagonal side = 26.

steps.title: Apply the sine ratio
steps.content: We apply the sine ratio: $$\sin y° = \frac{5}{26}$$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
